name: Telix Pharmaceuticals Limited
analysis: TLX has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 41% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$15.3300, stop A$13.0284, target A$22.2348 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
